settings.enabled_help: Show thumbnail sliders in the discussion list.
settings.slider_width_help: Width of the thumbnail slider. Height is auto (poster ratio 2:3).
settings.autoplay_speed_help: Time between slide transitions in milliseconds.
settings.max_images_help: Maximum number of images to show in the slider (max 20).
settings.min_img_size_help: Exclude images with width or height smaller than this value.
settings.max_img_size_help: Exclude images with width or height larger than this value.
settings.fallback_mode_label: Fallback when no image is available
settings.fallback_mode_help: Choose what to display when a discussion has no usable image, or when the image fails to load.

fallback.title: Fallback image library
fallback.not_active_mode: These images are only used when fallback mode is set to "Custom uploaded image".

support.title: Support This Extension
support.description: If you find this extension useful, please consider supporting its development with a small donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and maintained.

admin.title: Avatars in the discussion list
admin.help: Choose how the author avatar behaves in the discussion list, separately for desktop and mobile. This is a shared setting — changing it here also updates it in Thumb Sliders / Topic Rating, whichever you have installed.
admin.thumbs_inactive: Thumb Sliders is not active, so there is no thumbnail to replace the avatar with. The "replace" options below behave like "Show avatar" — use "Hide avatar" to drop avatars (e.g. for a lighter list on mobile).
admin.save_error: Could not save the avatar setting. Please try again.
admin.mode_with_image: Replace with thumbnail when the topic has an image
admin.hint_show: The author avatar is always shown.
admin.hint_hide: The avatar is never shown. If a thumbnail is available it stands in for it; otherwise the row simply has no avatar.
admin.hint_with_image: The thumbnail replaces the avatar only when the topic has a real image; otherwise the avatar is shown.
admin.hint_always: The thumbnail (or its configured fallback) always replaces the avatar; topics with no thumbnail at all keep the avatar.
admin.hint_replace_no_thumbs: Thumb Sliders is inactive, so the avatar is shown as usual. Install/enable Thumb Sliders to replace it with a thumbnail, or choose "Hide avatar".
